Bus Timings

Tasjeel Al Qusais Timings, Location and Services 2024

May 19, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Tasjeel Al Qusais is a vehicle testing and registration center located in the Al Qusais area of Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It is part of the Tasjeel network, which is operated by the Emirates National Oil Company (ENOC).

When it comes to vehicle inspection and registration in Dubai, Tasjeel Al Qusais stands out as one of the most reliable and comprehensive service centers in the city.

Located in Al Qusais Industrial 5 on Beirut Street, this center offers a range of services designed to ensure that your vehicle meets all necessary safety and regulatory standards.

Whether you’re a resident or a business owner managing a fleet, Tasjeel Al Qusais has got you covered.

Contents

Tasjeel Al Qusais Timings

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
Tasjeel Al Qusais operates six days a week, providing convenient hours to fit into your busy schedule. Here are the detailed timings: Day Operating Hours
  Monday 7:00 AM - 10:30 PM
  Tuesday 7:00 AM - 10:30 PM
  Wednesday 7:00 AM - 10:30 PM
  Thursday 7:00 AM - 10:30 PM
  Friday 7:00 AM - 10:30 PM
  Saturday 7:00 AM - 10:30 PM
  Sunday Closed

These hours ensure ample time for customers to visit and utilize the various vehicle inspection and registration services offered by Tasjeel Al Qusais throughout the week.## Location and Contact

The center’s address is Qusais - Beirut St - Dubai - United Arab Emirates. For any inquiries, you can reach them at +971 800 3662.

For further details or to book a service, you can contact via email at infotasjeel@eppcouae. com ## Services

Tasjeel Al Qusais provides an extensive array of services aimed at both light and heavy vehicles. Here are some of the key services available:- Vehicle Registration: Streamline your vehicle registration process with efficient services that save you time and hassle.

  • Comprehensive Testing: Ensure your vehicle meets all safety standards with thorough inspections.
  • Chassis Checking Measurements Test for Heavy and Light Vehicles: Get detailed chassis inspections to confirm the structural integrity of your vehicle.
  • On-Board Diagnostics (OBD): Modern diagnostic services to pinpoint and troubleshoot vehicle issues.
  • Export Test: Certify your vehicle for international export with precise testing services.
  • Car Valuation Certificate: Obtain accurate valuations for buying, selling, or insurance purposes.
  • Dubai Municipality Test for Food Transportation Vehicles: Specialized testing to comply with municipal regulations for food transport.
  • Civil Defense Test for Hazardous Materials Transportation Vehicles: Ensure compliance for vehicles transporting hazardous materials.
  • Trailer Test and Chassis Embossing: Specialized services for trailers and chassis modifications.
  • Drive Thru Express: Convenient drive-through lanes for quick vehicle inspections that do not require leaving your car.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: May 19, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
